# CareMyTrip

> Travel is the only thing you buy that makes you richer. CareMyTrip.com is a registered, Dehradun-based travel company (since 2013) specialising in Chardham Yatra, Himalayan and India tour packages, plus select international trips.

CareMyTrip plans pilgrimages and holidays end-to-end: stays, transport, darshan assistance and 24x7 support. Areas served: India, Nepal, Thailand, Malaysia, Canada, Kuwait.

## Contact
- Phone: +91-8527456666, +91-8527458888, +91-9389186101
- WhatsApp: +918527456666
- Email: info@caremytrip.com, caremytrip@gmail.com
- Address: CMTC House, Khasra No-123KA, Kuthalwali, Near Gorya Homes, Johrigoan, Dehradun, Uttarakhand 248003, India
- GSTIN: 05AAFCC4083R1Z7 | CIN: U63030DL2013PTC257344

## Tour packages
- [Ek Dham Yatra — Kedarnath Ji from Haridwar](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=ek-dham-kedarnath-haridwar) — Kedarnath, Uttarakhand, 3N / 4D, INR 12,900 (35% OFF). A focused 4-day pilgrimage to the revered Kedarnath shrine, starting and ending at Haridwar with comfortable stays and assisted darshan.
- [Do Dham Yatra from Haridwar 2026 — Kedarnath & Badrinath](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=do-dham-haridwar) — Kedarnath & Badrinath, Uttarakhand, 5N / 6D, INR 19,000 (24% OFF). Visit two of the four sacred dhams — Kedarnath and Badrinath — on a well-paced 6-day circuit from Haridwar.
- [Do Dham Yatra from Delhi 2026 — Kedarnath & Badrinath](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=do-dham-delhi) — Kedarnath & Badrinath (ex-Delhi), 7N / 8D, INR 26,900 (10% OFF). Door-to-door Do Dham pilgrimage starting from Delhi, covering Kedarnath and Badrinath with all transfers handled.
- [Chardham Yatra from Haridwar 2026 — 9N/10D](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=chardham-haridwar-2026) — Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath & Badrinath, 9N / 10D, INR 25,900 (19% OFF). The complete Char Dham circuit — Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath and Badrinath — over a comfortable 10-day journey from Haridwar.
- [Chardham Yatra by Helicopter 2026](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=chardham-helicopter-2026) — All Four Dhams by Helicopter, 6 Days, INR 2,35,000 (4% OFF). Cover all four dhams in just 6 days by helicopter — VIP darshan, premium stays and breathtaking Himalayan aerial views.
- [10 Days Luxury Char Dham Yatra from Haridwar](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=luxury-chardham-10-days) — All Four Dhams — Luxury, 9N / 10D, INR 99,000. The Char Dham circuit elevated — handpicked premium hotels, curated meals and dedicated assistance across all four shrines.
- [5 Nights Harsil Village Luxury Tour](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=harsil-village-luxury) — Harsil, Uttarakhand, 5N / 6D, INR 26,900 (10% OFF). Unwind in the apple-orchard hamlet of Harsil near Gangotri — pristine Himalayan landscapes, riverside walks and luxury stays.
- [Amazing Kerala — 05 Nights / 06 Days](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=amazing-kerala) — Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey & Kovalam, 4N / 5D, INR 14,200 (25% OFF). God's Own Country in one trip — tea-carpeted Munnar hills, Thekkady spice country and a houseboat night on the Alleppey backwaters.
- [Basant Panchami Kumbh Mela Tour](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=basant-panchami-kumbh-mela) — Prayagraj / Holy Sangam, 4N / 5D, INR 75,000 (16% OFF). Experience the world's largest spiritual gathering on the auspicious Basant Panchami Shahi Snan, with curated tented stays and guided rituals.
- [Auli by Helicopter](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=auli-by-heli) — Auli, Uttarakhand, 2N / 3D, INR 35,500. Skip the long drive — fly to Auli for snow-clad slopes, Asia's highest ropeway and panoramic views of Nanda Devi.
- [Nepal — Kathmandu & Pokhara](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=nepal-kathmandu-pokhara) — Kathmandu & Pokhara, Nepal, 5N / 6D, On request. Temples, stupas and the serene lakes of Pokhara with Himalayan panoramas — a classic Nepal circuit. Pricing on request.
- [Vietnam — Hanoi & Halong Bay](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=vietnam-hanoi-halong) — Hanoi & Halong Bay, Vietnam, 6N / 7D, On request. Vietnam's north — the buzzing old quarter of Hanoi and an overnight cruise through the limestone karsts of Halong Bay. Pricing on request.
